Neeraj Chopra clinched a silver medal at the Paris Olympics 2024 and brought glory to India once again. The ‘golden boy’ of India did it once again and in good time! Speaking of time, Chopra is the talk of the internet city and that too beyond his medal. Netizens have an eye for detail and they caught the stylish watch the athlete wore at the Olympics. According to social media report, the watch probably is worth nearly Rs 50 lakhs!

Photo Gallery: Paris Olympics 2024: Neeraj Chopra, Arshad Nadeem Shine As India-Pakistan Finish On PodiumNeeraj Chopra’s Stylish Watch at Paris Olympics 2024According to a post shared on Reddit, Neeraj Chopra was spotted wearing a black Omega watch. The Swiss luxury brand OMEGA announced Chopra as the spot’s ambassador. OMEGA is is also the Official Timekeeper at the Olympics. What caught the eye was an OMEGA Seamaster AquaTerra 150M around his wrist.Can anyone tell which watch Neeraj Chopra was wearing in the 2024 Paris Olympics finals?byu/Impressive-Tart6265inwatchesindiaAdd India.com as a Preferred SourceRedditors have made claims that several other athletes were also seen wearing some really exquisite timepieces from the same company.Neeraj Chopra wins a silver in Men’s javelin thrown at Paris Olympics 2024 (PTI)That does look like one good timepiece! The 26-year-old, who boasts of  a personal best of 89.94m at the Stockholm Diamond League in 2022, also set his season’s best in the qualifying round in Paris.According to the description on the official website of OMEGA. ” 41mm model, the symmetrical case has been crafted from stainless steel, with a wave-edged design featured on the back.The black dial is distinguished by a horizontal “teak” pattern which is inspired by the wooden decks of luxury sailboats. There is also a date window at 6 o’clock and rhodium-plated hands and indexes filled with white Super-LumiNova.” The stylish black strap is structured rubber.The luxe watch is priced at Rs 5,90,400 on the website. According to a post shared on Reddit, Neeraj Chopra was spotted wearing a black Omega watch. The Swiss luxury brand OMEGA announced Chopra as the spot’s ambassador. OMEGA is is also the Official Timekeeper at the Olympics. What caught the eye was an OMEGA Seamaster AquaTerra 150M around his wrist.

Can anyone tell which watch Neeraj Chopra was wearing in the 2024 Paris Olympics finals?byu/Impressive-Tart6265inwatchesindia





Redditors have made claims that several other athletes were also seen wearing some really exquisite timepieces from the same company.

Neeraj Chopra wins a silver in Men’s javelin thrown at Paris Olympics 2024 (PTI)

That does look like one good timepiece! The 26-year-old, who boasts of  a personal best of 89.94m at the Stockholm Diamond League in 2022, also set his season’s best in the qualifying round in Paris.

According to the description on the official website of OMEGA. ” 41mm model, the symmetrical case has been crafted from stainless steel, with a wave-edged design featured on the back.The black dial is distinguished by a horizontal “teak” pattern which is inspired by the wooden decks of luxury sailboats. There is also a date window at 6 o’clock and rhodium-plated hands and indexes filled with white Super-LumiNova.” The stylish black strap is structured rubber.

The luxe watch is priced at Rs 5,90,400 on the website. And if these reports are to believed and if it is the same watch, that Neeraj Chopra was a having one of the those good times!

title: Did Neeraj Chopra Wear Watch Worth Rs 50L at Paris Olympics 2024? Here is What We Know
description: Neeraj Chopra won a silver medal at Paris Olympics 2024. Reportedly, Neeraj Chopra was spotted wearing a Omega watch at the Olympics that is worth over lakhs.
keywords: neeraj chopra,neeraj chopra watch,neeraj chopra omega watch,neeraj chopra medals,neeraj chopra olympics,neeraj chopra javelin throw,neeraj chopra paris olympics,neeraj chopra 50 lakh watch,Gold Medalist Neeraj Chopra,Paris Olympics 2024
